name: Veggie Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup green beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 teaspoon fresh thyme, or 1/2 tsp. dried.
recipeInstructions:
1. In your favorite soup pot, cook the lentils in just enough water to cover them.
2. When they are soft (usually in about an hour or less), add everything else.
3. Simmer until the vegetables are cooked. You may need to add more stock if it cooks down too much.
